text:
You are the Rust backend developer on the cli-gui-wrapper team. Your job is to implement the CLI subprocess infrastructure for kangnam-client.

## Context
kangnam-client is a Tauri 2 (Rust + React) desktop app being pivoted from a direct LLM API client to a GUI wrapper for coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex CLI). You own all Rust backend work.

## Your Tasks (in order)
You are assigned tasks T1-T7, T9-T10. Check the team task list for details and dependencies. Work through them in ID order (T1 first, then T2, etc). T8 is handled by team-lead.

## Implementation Plan
The full implementation plan is at: `docs/llm/cli-gui-wrapper-plan.md`
Read it before starting. Each task has exact code and file paths.

## Key Rules
1. Read the plan task section BEFORE implementing each task
2. Read existing files before modifying them
3. Do NOT touch frontend files (src/renderer/) — that's react-frontend's job
4. Do NOT delete providers/ or auth/ directories — that's team-lead's T8
5. After each task: mark it completed via TaskUpdate, then check TaskList for next available work
6. Commit after each task with a descriptive message
7. When T1 is done, message react-frontend so they can start

## Working Directory
/Users/kangnam/projects/kangnam-client

## Getting Started
1. Read docs/llm/cli-gui-wrapper-plan.md
2. Check TaskList for your first unblocked task
3. Claim it (TaskUpdate with owner: "rust-backend")
4. Implement following the plan
5. Commit and mark complete
6. Repeat

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"T1: Define core types (types.rs, cli/mod.rs)","description":"Create src-tauri/src/cli/types.rs with UnifiedMessage enum, CliStatus, CliConfig, TokenUsage, SkillInfo, AgentInfo. Create src-tauri/src/cli/mod.rs. See plan Task 1.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:15:02.876Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"T2: Define CliAdapter trait (adapter.rs, adapters/mod.rs)","description":"Create src-tauri/src/cli/adapter.rs with CliAdapter trait. Create src-tauri/src/cli/adapters/mod.rs. See plan Task 2.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:16:36.475Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"T3: Implement Claude Code adapter","description":"Create src-tauri/src/cli/adapters/claude.rs. Parse Claude Code NDJSON: system, stream_event, assistant, result, control_request types. See plan Task 3.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:19:12.037Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"T4: Implement Codex CLI adapter","description":"Create src-tauri/src/cli/adapters/codex.rs. Parse Codex JSONL: thread.started, turn.*, item.*, error types. Non-persistent (one process per prompt). See plan Task 4.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:19:12.298Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"T5: Implement CLI Manager","description":"Create src-tauri/src/cli/manager.rs. Subprocess spawn/kill, stdin/stdout piping, Tauri event emit. Handle persistent (Claude) and one-shot (Codex) modes. See plan Task 5.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:19:30.039Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"6","subject":"T6: Implement CLI Registry","description":"Create src-tauri/src/cli/registry.rs. Provider metadata (name, display_name, install_hint). See plan Task 6.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:19:30.420Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"7","subject":"T7: Tauri IPC commands","description":"Create src-tauri/src/commands/cli.rs. Commands: cli_list_providers, cli_check_installed, cli_install, cli_start_session, cli_send_message, cli_send_permission, cli_stop_session. See plan Task 7.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:19:30.662Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"9","subject":"T9: Wire up backend - lib.rs, state.rs, commands/mod.rs","description":"Update state.rs (remove provider state, add CliManager), commands/mod.rs (remove old mods, add cli), skills/mod.rs (remove ai), lib.rs (add CLI Manager init, register adapters, register new commands). See plan Task 9.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:20:06.358Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"10","subject":"T10: DB schema update","description":"Update schema.rs (add message_type column), conversations.rs (provider → cli_provider). Add migration logic. See plan Task 10.","assignedBy":"rust-backend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:20:06.938Z"}
T8 complete — providers/, auth/, cowork/, eval/, and related files all deleted. T9 (wire up backend) is now unblocked. Go ahead.
T8 is done and committed. T9 is unblocked — go ahead with wiring up lib.rs, state.rs, commands/mod.rs. Then T10 (DB schema).
All your tasks are done. Stand by — I'll call you back if T20 (integration build) surfaces Rust compilation errors that need fixing.
